🎯 FEATURE EPIC - PRODUCT REQUIREMENTS DOCUMENT (PRD)
This template follows world-class PRD best practices and integrates with our AAFD methodology.
Complete all sections to ensure proper feature planning and stakeholder alignment.
-->

## 📋 Executive Summary

**Problem Statement:** What specific problem does this feature solve for our users?

**Solution Overview:** Brief description of how this feature addresses the problem.

**Business Impact:** Why is this important for SlideHeroes and our users right now?

- **Technical Metrics:** [How will we measure technical success? e.g., performance, reliability]

- 📈 [Specific metric target, e.g., "Increase user engagement by 15%"]
